items.title: HealthHub repurposed content ready for review
items.summary: Interview Valet delivered repurposed podcast content for The HealthHub. Content is available on dashboard and needs review.
items.actionNeeded: Review the repurposed content on dashboard or via provided Google Drive link.

items.title: Automate podcast notification workflow with UPQODE
items.summary: Dr. Haas asked if podcast update notifications from Yanina to UPQODE can be automated. UPQODE requested continued email notifications when new podcasts are added to spreadsheet.
items.actionNeeded: Decide whether to implement automation or continue manual email notifications for podcast updates.
